headline: NRG Energy (NRG) Valuation After CEO Shift Toward AI Hyperscale Power And Virtual Power Plant Growth
summary: NRG Energy (NRG) is drawing investor attention after appointing Robert Gaudette as CEO, with a clear focus on supplying power for AI driven hyperscalers and on expanding demand response and virtual power plant programs. See our latest analysis for NRG Energy. Despite the CEO transition and the focus on AI related power demand, NRG’s share price has pulled back sharply, with the 30 day share price return down 23.8% and the year to date share price return down 23.1%, even as the 3 year total...
